criteriaCoverage.evidence: presign under ${workspace_id}/ (workspace from context not body); LocalStack e2e RAN (put.ok true so checksum fix works) -> real sharp 3 variants (1200/800/400 no upscale) -w400 width=400; usage_counters value==bytesRecorded real PG additive. requestChecksumCalculation WHEN_REQUIRED.

Playwright REAL Chromium (chrome-headless-shell-1223) 2 passed. core grapesjs 0.21 BSD-3 + grapesjs-mjml, NOT Studio SDK. getHtml returns <mjml>; payload {name,mjml} only; server compileMjml then buildTemplateUpsert; save-template.integration real PG: mjml verbatim + server compiled_html, workspace-scoped idempotent.

buildImageKey throws empty workspace; sanitizeFilename strips ../separators/NUL. isolation test: ../WS_B/pwned under WS_A -> key WS_A/, B prefix 0 objects. body workspace_id ignored. variant handler assertKeyInWorkspace. record-usage: B never touches A. Documents LocalStack doesn't validate presigned SigV4 (asserts app-layer guard).

criticalIssues: PRE-EXISTING Phase-10 FLAKE: services/campaign-runner/test/idempotent-concurrent-sweep.integration.test.ts fails ~80% standalone ('2 ticks completed instead of 1', claim race) though both cold full runs reported 36/36. Must root-cause: determine if this is a TEST-harness race or a REAL double-advance (which would break the §9B idempotency guarantee), then fix so it is deterministically green standalone AND in-suite.
recommendations: Add UNIQUE(workspace_id,name) on email_templates + native ON CONFLICT (buildTemplateUpsert CTE has a theoretical same-name race).
Add AWS_ENDPOINT_URL to turbo.json test env passthrough (e2e only works via default endpoint now).
Widen web lint to e2e/ and test/.
Consider vite build && preview for Playwright in CI to catch build-only regressions.
